description: During a live sports broadcast, an automated alert indicates that an ad failed to play in its designated slot.

nodes.task_description: Acknowledge the ad insertion failure alert and identify the failed ad creative and the scheduled time slot.

expected_outcome.value: Agent correctly identifies the specific ad and commercial break that was affected.

nodes.task_description: Check the ad server logs for an error code related to the failure.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds an error code indicating 'Creative Not Found'.

nodes.task_description: Immediately insert a backup 'house ad' into the next available slot to meet broadcast time requirements.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully schedules a backup ad to play.

nodes.task_description: Create a ticket for the ad operations team to investigate the missing creative file.

expected_outcome.value: Agent creates a detailed ticket and assigns it to the correct team.
